comments.author: @WorldsinStone
comments.text:
If you enjoyed exploring Svalbard, the frozen town where darkness lasts for months, then you should definitely watch this next video about Greenland.

Because there’s one place on Earth that feels even more isolated… and even more mysterious.

What really happens when people choose to live at the edge of the world?

👉 https://youtu.be/JA4nNibMf6k?si=wsVkO92HZejZgDo4
